name: Island Pan Barbecued Shrimp
recipeIngredient: 1/4 tsp Cayenne pepper, or to taste
recipeInstructions:
Caribbean cuisine often features bold flavors. This dish combines rosemary, thyme, cayenne, black pepper, and garlic for a spicy kick. For best results, marinate the shrimp at room temperature for 1 hour before cooking.
1. In a bowl, combine all ingredients except lime halves. Mix well to ensure even distribution of seasonings.
2. Heat a dry skillet over medium-high heat until hot. Add shrimp in a single layer, being careful not to overcrowd the pan. Cook shrimp 2-4 minutes per side, depending on size, brushing with remaining marinade before turning.
3. Garnish with halved lime halves and serve immediately.
Per serving: 203 calories, 9 grams fat, 172 milligrams cholesterol.
